description: User pauses while reading task instructions on the screen, with the cursor parked in the top right corner.
frame_description: The screen displays text instructions regarding flight preferences and search criteria.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button on the UI overlay.
frame_description: A circular 'Open' button with an external link icon is visible and interacted with.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button again to trigger navigation.
frame_description: The user interacts with the 'Open' button a second time.

description: The page navigates from the instruction screen to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from a dark instruction page to the white Google search interface.

description: User dwells on the Google homepage after navigation.
frame_description: The Google search page is fully loaded and visible.

description: User hovers over the 'Open' button next to the 'Repeat the task instructions' prompt.
frame_description: A UI element at the bottom of the screen appears with the text 'Repeat the task instructions' and an 'Open' button.
